title: R's Backpack
description: This mod provides an vanilla friendly backpacks for sorting and carrying items.
body:
#  R's Backpack mod
Simple backpack for vanilla friendly experiance.

The deafult backpack is created with leather, iron, string, torch, glass. The backpack can be upgraded one time using iron ingots and one iron block.

The default version has 10 extra inventory slots and the upgraded version has 20 inventory slots.
The recipes are in the gallery of both the default and the upgraded one.

If you want to please suppornt me on my patreon by clicking [here](https://patreon.com/Rafsan36?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink
